title: Linear Endobronchial Ultrasound With a Lung Target: Analysis of the Stather Canadian Outcomes Registry for Chest Procedures (SCOPE).
abstract: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) is a minimally invasive procedure that allows for the evaluation of mediastinal and hilar lymph nodes. It has also been described in limited studies for the evaluation of central pulmonary lesions.
